{{Quote|I've ''been'' there, friend, and those ruins of your—what'd you call 'em?—'Sharu,' are the biggest hunks of engineering in the known galaxy. What's more, they cover every body in the system larger than my thumbnail.|Arun Feb|<ref name="sharu" />}}
'''Arun Feb''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Mining/Legends|miner]] who worked as the assistant to supervisor [[Vett Fori]] for an outfit based on [[Oseon 2795]]. A short, stocky man, Feb was relatively well-traveled, having seen the massive, mysterious ruins of the long-vanished [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]] in the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]], and having beheld [[Dinosaur/Legends|dinosaurs]] on [[Trammis III/Legends|Trammis III]]. In his off-hours, Feb entertained himself with games of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]—Feb, Fori and several others played a game with offworld [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]]. Although Feb left the game before Calrissian completely cleaned him out, he stayed long enough to witness local [[Constable/Legends|Constable]] [[T. Lund Phuna]] attempt to frame Calrissian for cheating and arrest him. Not willing to let Calrissian suffer such injustice, Feb and Fori knocked Phund unconscious and allowed the offworlder to escape.<ref name="sharu" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' {{1st}}
